title: Bridge Essay: Explicit and implicit monitoring in neurodegeneration and stroke.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dashboard Diagnosis** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Metacognition — self-awareness, self-monitoring, neural correlates of meta-awareness.

**Explicit and implicit monitoring in neurodegeneration and stroke.**. Sci Rep.. PMID: 31575976. DOI: 10.1038/s41598-019-50599-x. Monitoring is acomplex multidimensional neurocognitive phenomenon. Patients with fronto-insular stroke (FIS), behavioural variant frontotemporal dementia (bvFTD) and Alzheimer'sdisease (AD) show alack of self-awareness, insight, and self-monitoring, which translate into anosognosia and daily behavioural impairments.
